prompt:
Implement a function named 'validate_image_url' that accepts an image URL and returns the full URL after confirming the domain is part of a trusted image hosting providers list. The function's name should be validate_image_url. The function should take 1 arguments, i.e., - img_url: str, representing the input image URL. The function should return The resolved valid URL if it belongs to the list of trusted domains. The function should raise - Raises ValueError if the domain is not in the trusted list or the scheme is unsupported. The following setup code will be provided to you:
```
from urllib.parse import urlparse
TRUSTED_IMAGE_HOSTS = ["img.example.com", "cdn.trusted.com", "images.hosting.com"]
ALLOWED_SCHEMES = ["http", "https"]
```

Here's some additional context about the imported packages and global variables: Make sure the function operates solely with trusted image host domains 

Please implement the function according to the description and setup above. Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python.

EXAMPLE INPUT/OUTPUT:
{
  "input": {
    "img_url": "https://img.example.com/image123.png"
  },
  "output": "https://img.example.com/image123.png"
}
code:
from urllib.parse import urlparse
TRUSTED_IMAGE_HOSTS = ["img.example.com", "cdn.trusted.com", "images.hosting.com"]
ALLOWED_SCHEMES = ["http", "https"]

def validate_image_url(img_url: str) -> str:
    """
    Validates an image URL and returns it if the domain is trusted.
    
    Args:
        img_url: str - The input image URL to validate
        
    Returns:
        str - The resolved valid URL if it belongs to the list of trusted domains
        
    Raises:
        ValueError - If the domain is not in the trusted list or the scheme is unsupported
    """
    # Parse the URL
    parsed_url = urlparse(img_url)
    
    # Extract scheme and domain
    scheme = parsed_url.scheme
    domain = parsed_url.netloc
    
    # Check if scheme is allowed
    if scheme not in ALLOWED_SCHEMES:
        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported scheme '{scheme}'. Only {ALLOWED_SCHEMES} are allowed.")
    
    # Check if domain is trusted
    if domain not in TRUSTED_IMAGE_HOSTS:
        raise ValueError(f"Domain '{domain}' is not in the trusted hosts list.")
    
    # Return the full URL if all checks pass
    return img_url
